generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance HorizontalCartMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor responsible for horizontal movement of the gantry crane cart, interfaced with encoder feedback for closed-loop control."
]

instance VerticalHoistMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor responsible for vertical hoisting of the crane payload, equipped with encoder feedback for precise positioning."
]

instance CraneElectromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet at the crane's hoist end enabling container pickup and release operations."
]

instance CraneController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Embedded or software-based control system interfaced with crane actuators to execute motion commands, enforce safety constraints, and synchronize with the Digital Twin."
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance CranePositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Encoder sensor measuring the horizontal position of the crane cart with high precision for trajectory validation."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CranePositionData
]

instance CraneVelocityEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Encoder sensor measuring the horizontal velocity of the crane cart for real-time kinematic validation."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneVelocityData
]

instance HoistPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Encoder sensor measuring the vertical position of the hoist for precise payload positioning."
    DTDFVocab:producedData HoistPositionData
]

instance HoistVelocityEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Encoder sensor measuring the vertical velocity of the hoist for real-time kinematic validation."
    DTDFVocab:producedData HoistVelocityData
]

instance CraneAccelerationSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring acceleration of the crane cart and hoist for dynamic behavior validation."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneAccelerationData
]

instance ControllerStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor capturing the operational state of the embedded crane controller, including command execution status."
    DTDFVocab:producedData ControllerStateData
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance CranePositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CranePositionEncoder
]

instance CraneVelocityData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneVelocityEncoder
]

instance HoistPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HoistPositionEncoder
]

instance HoistVelocityData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HoistVelocityEncoder
]

instance CraneAccelerationData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneAccelerationSensor
]

instance ControllerStateData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ControllerStateSensor
]

instance HistoricalOperationalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data of crane operations including motor currents, encoder positions, and controller commands stored in TimescaleDB."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CranePositionData, CraneVelocityData, HoistPositionData, HoistVelocityData, CraneAccelerationData, ControllerStateData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataLoggingEnabler
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance CraneKinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Parametric kinematic model of the gantry crane using Denavit-Hartenberg parameters or forward/inverse kinematics to mirror physical behavior."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KinematicSimulationEnabler
]

instance CraneKinematicModelOutput : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneKinematicModel
]

instance SimulatedTrajectories : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Digitally generated trajectory plans based on the crane's kinematic model for validation against physical execution."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneKinematicModelOutput
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ContinuousValidationEnabler
]

instance ExecutedTrajectoryData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time measurements of executed trajectories retrieved from TimescaleDB for validation against simulated trajectories."
    DTDFVocab:fromData HistoricalOperationalData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ContinuousValidationEnabler
]

instance ValidationMetrics : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Distance metrics (Euclidean error, time synchronization drift) computed during continuous validation to quantify model-physical discrepancies."
    DTDFVocab:fromData ContinuousValidationOutput
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataVisualizationEnabler
]

instance ContinuousValidationOutput : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ContinuousValidationService
]

// C11: Enablers
instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database optimized for high-write workloads storing crane operational data with millisecond precision."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService
]

instance MQTTBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker enabling low-latency, bidirectional data streaming between physical crane and digital twin services."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService, ContinuousValidationService, OptimalControlService
]

instance GrafanaEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real-time dashboard platform for visualizing crane state, trajectory execution, and validation metrics."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance PythonKinematicsEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python-based kinematic libraries (PyRobot, URDF parsers) for generating and validating trajectory plans."
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance DockerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization platform packaging digital twin services in isolated, reproducible environments."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService, ContinuousValidationService, OptimalControlService
]

instance KinematicSimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Simulation environment using crane kinematic model to generate reference trajectories for validation."
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

instance ContinuousValidationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom Python scripts comparing physical execution data against simulated trajectories using metric-based validation (RMSE, synchronization latency)."
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

instance DataLoggingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Service capturing and storing crane operational state including kinematic parameters and trajectory execution metrics."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService
]

instance OptimalControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Control algorithms generating energy-efficient and precise movement trajectories for the crane."
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService
]

instance DataVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Service providing real-time and retrospective dashboards for visualizing crane state, trajectory execution, and validation metrics."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

// C6: Services
instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Records time-series operational data for post-analysis, trend detection, and performance benchmarking of the gantry crane."
    DTDFVocab:provides CraneOperationalInsight, SystemDegradationAlert
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides real-time and retrospective dashboards to monitor crane state, trajectory execution, and system health with interactive visualization."
    DTDFVocab:provides CraneStateVisualization, TrajectoryComparisonVisualization
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuously compares measurements from executed trajectories with simulated trajectories using distance metrics to validate accuracy."
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelPhysicalDiscrepancyInsight, ValidationMetricsData
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates and executes optimal movement trajectories for the crane using its kinematic model for energy-efficient payload transport."
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryPlan, EnergyEfficiencyInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Implements anomaly detection by analyzing deviations between physical and digital twin states to classify faults and trigger alerts."
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultClassificationInsight, SystemAnomalyAlert
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance CraneOperationalInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Longitudinal analysis of crane operations including performance metrics and operational anomalies detected through historical data."
]

instance SystemDegradationAlert : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated alert triggered when performance degradation patterns are detected in crane operations."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance CraneStateVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of crane kinematic state including position, velocity, and acceleration metrics."
]

instance TrajectoryComparisonVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive comparison of physical vs. simulated trajectories with error plots and synchronization metrics."
]

instance ModelPhysicalDiscrepancyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Quantified metrics of discrepancies between digital twin simulations and physical crane execution."
]

instance ValidationMetricsData : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Computed validation metrics including Euclidean error and time synchronization drift between physical and virtual systems."
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryPlan : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Energy-efficient trajectory plans generated for crane operations based on kinematic optimization."
]

instance EnergyEfficiencyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of energy consumption patterns during crane operations to identify optimization opportunities."
]

instance FaultClassificationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Classification of detected faults based on historical data patterns and deviation analysis."
]

instance SystemAnomalyAlert : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated alert triggered when unexpected motor behavior or sensor failures are detected."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C1: Environment
instance LaboratoryEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Controlled laboratory setting enabling real-time bidirectional data exchange between physical gantry crane and its Digital Twin."
    base:contains PhysicalCraneSystem, DigitalTwinSystem
]

instance PhysicalCraneSystem : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane with kinematic constraints representative of industrial cranes, featuring modular design for reproducible experimentation."
    base:contains HorizontalCartMotor, VerticalHoistMotor, CraneElectromagnet, CraneController,
                   CranePositionEncoder, CraneVelocityEncoder, HoistPositionEncoder, HoistVelocityEncoder,
                   CraneAccelerationSensor, ControllerStateSensor
]

instance DigitalTwinSystem : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital representation of the gantry crane system enabling simulation, validation, and control optimization."
    base:contains CraneKinematicModel, SimulatedTrajectories, HistoricalOperationalData, ExecutedTrajectoryData,
                   ValidationMetrics, TimescaleDBEnabler, MQTTBrokerEnabler, GrafanaEnabler, PythonKinematicsEnabler,
                   DockerEnabler, KinematicSimulationEnabler, ContinuousValidationEnabler, DataLoggingEnabler,
                   OptimalControlEnabler, DataVisualizationEnabler
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control flows originate from the **Trajectory Generator Service**, which leverages a kinematics model of the crane to generate optimal movement trajectories devoid of residual swinging motion. These trajectories are relayed to the **Control Application**, which uses the **Physical Crane Interface** to issue commands to the physical crane’s controllers. The **Logging Application** provides feedback by recording executed trajectories, enabling the **Continuous Validation Service** to compare real-world performance against simulations. No explicit details on control message formats (e.g., PWM, stepper motor commands), validation/authentication mechanisms, or conflict resolution protocols are documented. Command execution confirmation is implied through the logging and validation pipeline but not explicitly described as a discrete mechanism."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin systems in the documents follow a **lightweight, ad-hoc orchestration pattern** with **modular integration** of components. The **GreenhouseDT** exemplar employs a **hybrid architecture** combining **InfluxDB (time-series database)**, **ActiveMQ (message broker)**, and **virtual machines (VMs)** for behavioral adaptation, indicating a **service-oriented constellation** where data ingestion, processing, and twin adaptation are decoupled. The **Air Quality Management** exemplar uses **AutomationML-based digital twins** integrated with **Microsoft Azure tools**, suggesting a **model-driven orchestration pipeline** for runtime visualization, simulation, and prediction. Both exemplars avoid commercial frameworks, opting instead for **containerization/virtualization (e.g., VMs, Raspberry Pi)** to ensure **easy dissemination and reproducibility**. The **gantry crane system** (logistics/cyber-physical domain) adopts a **C4 Model** for architecture visualization, implying **component-level coordination** but lacks explicit details on resource management or system-wide orchestration. **Resource management** is implied through the use of **prerecorded data in VMs (GreenhouseDT)** and **sensor-driven Raspberry Pi setups (Air Quality Management)**, but no centralized governance or dynamic scaling mechanisms are described."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The **GreenhouseDT** exemplar emphasizes **self-adaptive behavioral models** with **prerecorded data** in VMs, implying a focus on **offline validation** via historical datasets. The **Air Quality Management** exemplar includes **runtime visualization, simulation, and prediction** applications, suggesting **real-time validation** through Azure-based pipelines. However, no explicit **uncertainty quantification**, **error correction mechanisms**, or **formal verification methods** (e.g., model calibration protocols) are documented. Both exemplars adopt an **ad-hoc approach**, lacking standardized fidelity metrics or commercial framework-backed validation processes."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The digital twin system employs a **TimescaleDB** database as the central repository for all system-generated data, including crane state logs, trajectory metrics, and simulation outputs. Inter-service communication is managed via an **MQTT Broker**, facilitating asynchronous signaling between containers (e.g., Trajectory Generator, Simulation, Validation). The system is deployed locally on a personal computer, with containers orchestrated using a **docker compose** file, though no specifics on network topology (e.g., client-server, peer-to-peer), bandwidth/latency requirements, or security protocols (e.g., TLS) are provided. The architecture implies a tightly coupled, local deployment with no explicit redundancy or failover mechanisms."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The **Digital Twin Hosting and Deployment** infrastructure is **on-premise**, co-located with the physical gantry crane system to minimize latency. The **digital twin containers** (Database, Dashboard, Trajectory Generator, Simulation, Validation, MQTT Broker) are deployed as **Python-based services** on local servers or high-performance workstations, with **TimescaleDB** (a time-series database optimized for high-write workloads) as the primary storage backend. **Computational requirements** are moderate for trajectory generation and simulation but demand **real-time processing** for validation tasks. **Storage requirements** scale with operational duration, as the Logging Application continuously archives crane state data. **Scalability mechanisms** are not explicitly described, but the modular container architecture (C4 Model) allows for horizontal scaling of services (e.g., additional MQTT brokers or validation instances). **Deployment models** are **monolithic for the physical crane** (hardware + interface) but **microservices-based for the digital twin**, enabling independent updates to services like the Trajectory Generator or Dashboard. **Availability/reliability assurance** is implied by the **Continuous Validation Service**, which monitors system integrity and alerts operators to breaches in physical-digital alignment, though no explicit redundancy (e.g., failover databases) is mentioned."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin systems demonstrate **limited but domain-specific horizontal integration** with external systems. The **GreenhouseDT** exemplar relies on **InfluxDB (time-series database)** and **ActiveMQ (message broker)** for internal data exchange but does not explicitly detail integration with external enterprise systems or other Digital Twins. The **Air Quality Management** exemplar uses **AutomationML** for digital twin modeling and **Microsoft Azure tools** for pipeline implementation, indicating **standardized data exchange (AutomationML)** with potential interoperability in construction engineering contexts. However, dependencies on external systems (e.g., cloud services, IoT platforms) are not elaborated beyond Azure’s role. The **gantry crane system** lacks explicit integration details but aligns with the broader trend of **ad-hoc, domain-specific Digital Twins** with no mention of cross-system protocols or enterprise interoperability. **Data exchange protocols** are only implied (e.g., AutomationML, Azure APIs), and no **federated Digital Twin architectures** or **standardized interoperability frameworks** (e.g., OPC UA, MQTT) are referenced."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The **Air Quality Management** exemplar adheres to **AutomationML** for digital twin modeling and **Microsoft Azure tools** for pipeline implementation, ensuring interoperability within construction engineering contexts. The **Lab-Scale Gantry Crane** uses the **C4 Model** for architecture documentation, though no explicit industry standards (e.g., ISO, IEC) are mentioned. The **GreenhouseDT** system employs **InfluxDB** (time-series database) and **ActiveMQ** (message broker), but no compliance frameworks (e.g., ISO 27001, GDPR) or interoperability standards (e.g., OPC UA, AMQP) are referenced in the documents. Only **AutomationML** is explicitly noted as a standardization effort."
]
